headline: Why the Gold Rush Is Over for These Mining Stocks.
summary: Mining stocks are on a bad run, and the selloff deepened on Thursday as the apparent lack of progress in peace talks between the U.S. and Iran put investors on edge.  Freeport-McMoRan  dipped 1.9% in early trading, and Newmont slid 0.2%.  Newmont is down more than 22% since the Iran war began, while Freeport has fallen 19% over the same period.

raw.headline: Why the Gold Rush Is Over for These Mining Stocks.

Freeport-McMoRan  dipped 1.9% in early trading, and Newmont slid 0.2%.  Newmont is down more than 22% since the Iran war began, while Freeport has fallen 19% over the same period.

headline: The Gold Rush Is Over for Mining Stocks.
summary: Mining stocks are on a bad run, and the selloff deepened on Thursday as the apparent lack of progress in peace talks between the U.S. and Iran put investors on edge.  Freeport-McMoRan  dipped 2.2% in early trading, though Newmont was largely flat after recovering from early losses.  Newmont is down more than 22% since the Iran war began, while  Freeport  has fallen 19% over the same period.

headline: Freeport Provides Update on Wardens Hearing on Renewal of Exploration License for Yandera Copper Project
summary: Positive community support expressed for the renewal of EL 1335 for the Yandera Copper Project and its potential to advance the region's economic development.Warden will now produce a report to Mining Advisory Council, following the March 25, 2026 Wardens Hearing.Renewal of EL 1335 is a key step towards unlocking the Prefeasibility* stage Yandera Copper Project with a historical 727 million tons of measured and indicated resources averaging 0.39% copper equivalent.Vancouver, British...
